rows.label: qev085107_MSG0001
rows.name: Rest easy. The Growth squad is gone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0002
rows.name:
Um, if it's alright, won't you escape with
us? It's dangerous if you stay here forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_JNK0010
rows.name: Concern

rows.label: qev085107_SEL0011
rows.name: Show concern for Celica and Rock.

rows.label: qev085107_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquiry

rows.label: qev085107_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about Celica and Rock's circumstances.

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0004
rows.name:
I won't be deceived by
your pretending to care.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0005
rows.name:
It seems you cannot trust
us. I won't force you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0006
rows.name:
But we do want to be of help to
you. Please don't forget that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0007
rows.name: Our circumstances—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0008
rows.name:
If it's alright, could you tell us why
you were being chased by the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0009
rows.name:
We shouldn't pry too much into other people's
affairs. Not until they themselves wish to speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0010
rows.name: Hey, Celica— Can't we trust these people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0011
rows.name: But—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0012
rows.name: Big sister, is your name Celica-san mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0013
rows.name: Are you... a Nopon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0014
rows.name: Tatsu is Tatsu mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0014_2
rows.name:
Tatsu was saved from the Growth
by these Earthlings mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0014_2_m
rows.name:
Tatsu was saved from the Growth
by these Earthlings mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0014_2_f
rows.name:
Tatsu was saved from the Growth
by these Earthlings mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0015
rows.name: Then you're just like us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0016
rows.name:
That's right mo. Tatsu wants you to swear
on Tatsu and trust these people mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0017
rows.name: Everyone is a good person mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0018
rows.name: Well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0019
rows.name:
Um, we're being chased by the
Growth, but we have nowhere to go—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0020
rows.name:
In our city, NLA, many races
besides Earthlings live together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0021
rows.name: How about staying there for a while?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you like it, you can stay as long as you
want, and if you don't, you are free to leave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0023
rows.name: —Um, we'll be in your care. I am Celica.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0024
rows.name: I'm Rock! Nice to meet you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0025
rows.name: I'm Lin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0026
rows.name:
Here, these are the coordinates for
our city, NLA. Can you read them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0027
rows.name:
Yes, I believe the two of
us can make it there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085107_MSG0028
rows.name:
Then, let's meet again in the
city, Celica-san, Rock-san![ST:wait ]
